_meta.name: okta-add-user-to-group
_meta.description: Add an Okta user to a group. Two approaches: (A) via user profile Groups tab — navigate to user, click Groups tab, Assign; (B) via group detail Assign People. This payload uses approach A (user-centric). Requires userId.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). Get from list-users perceive mainActions.

group_name.description: Name of the group to add the user to

anomalies: Groups tab href is #tab-groups on user profile page
Assign Groups button may open a search modal — type group name to filter
The 'Everyone' group cannot have members added manually (auto-populated)

chain.note: Navigate to user profile page. {{userId}} must be a valid Okta user ID.
Confirm profile loaded. Look for tab bar with 'Groups' tab.
Click Groups tab to see current group memberships
Perceive Groups tab content. Look for 'Assign' or '+ Add Groups' button.
Click Assign button to open group assignment UI. Fallbacks: 'Add Groups', '+ Assign Groups'.
Wait for group search modal to open
Search for the target group by name
Verify target group appears in results.
Select the target group from results
Verify group appears in user's Groups tab list.
